title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SBI Life Insurance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SBI Life Insurance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, SBI Life Insurance in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SBI Life Insurance:
SBI Life Insurance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
